rule: approved screens are composed route states; production must not create one bespoke component per prototype HTML file

AppShell.purpose: personal consumer shell and focused route host
AppShell.accessibility: exposes skip target, page title and ordered landmark regions

WorkspaceShell.purpose: verified workspace operating shell without removing personal access
WorkspaceShell.accessibility: announces active workspace and pending priority count

MoolRoot.purpose: one-tap return to universal action resolver
MoolRoot.accessibility: stable name Mool; never labelled root or home in visible UI

ChatShortcut.purpose: one-tap chat access with unread state
ChatShortcut.accessibility: announces unread count without repeating on every render

ActionDock.purpose: stable mobile access to Mool, current route actions and Chat
ActionDock.accessibility: selected state and horizontal scroll region are announced

FocusRail.purpose: compact swipeable main or sub-action selection
FocusRail.accessibility: keyboard arrows, selected state and full readable labels

SearchAskScanVoice.purpose: universal typed, conversational, camera and voice entry
SearchAskScanVoice.accessibility: separate named buttons and live status for listening or scanning

DecisionCard.purpose: product, service, booking, ride or work decision before commitment
DecisionCard.accessibility: reading order presents decision data before action

ProductDecisionRow.accessibility: quantity changes announce new quantity and total

DenseCatalogue.purpose: virtualized discovery across large SKU or service sets
DenseCatalogue.accessibility: result count, applied filters and load-more progress are announced

OpportunityRow.accessibility: expanding one row collapses the previous row and retains focus

MoneySummary.purpose: gross, deductions, net, held, available and timing disclosure
MoneySummary.accessibility: does not communicate money state by colour alone

StatusTimeline.purpose: order, payment, ride, work, support and verification progress
StatusTimeline.accessibility: ordered list with current step and timestamps

Receipt.purpose: authoritative consumer, supplier, ride, payout or service record
Receipt.accessibility: semantic table or description list and downloadable text alternative

ChatThread.purpose: people, business, order and support communication
ChatThread.accessibility: message chronology, sender, delivery state and attachment labels are announced

MediaViewer.purpose: full-screen shorts, video, image and document viewing
MediaViewer.accessibility: captions, playback controls, focus-safe overlays and reduced-motion behavior

EvidenceUploader.purpose: task, delivery, issue, verification and goods-receipt evidence
EvidenceUploader.accessibility: file type, progress, validation and removal are announced

AvailabilityControl.purpose: manual, scheduled and capacity-driven public availability
AvailabilityControl.accessibility: switch state and next automatic change are explicit

ConsentControl.accessibility: purpose and consequence are associated with the control

AgentApproval.purpose: review of prepared or bounded agent action
AgentApproval.accessibility: changed values and irreversible consequence are read before approval

DataTable.purpose: desktop business and admin records with responsive mobile rows
DataTable.accessibility: caption, headers, sort state and row actions are semantic

LoadingSkeleton.accessibility: single polite loading announcement; decorative skeleton is hidden

EmptyState.purpose: explain absence and offer one best next action
EmptyState.accessibility: focus remains on heading; action has a direct name

OfflineBanner.accessibility: connectivity changes use a restrained live region

ErrorRecovery.accessibility: focus moves to error heading only after a submitted action fails

RestrictedState.purpose: verification, serviceability, policy or permission restriction
RestrictedState.accessibility: does not expose internal risk rules or protected data

SheetModalToast.purpose: progressive detail, confirmation and transient feedback
SheetModalToast.accessibility: focus trap only for modal, return focus on close, toast never owns a required action

compositionRules: one primary action owns the current step
Mool and Chat are shell controls and are not repeated inside content
route states share components and APIs instead of creating screen-specific copies
all components implement loading empty partial offline error restricted stale and duplicate behavior when applicable
responsive variants preserve action order and wording
